title: fablever measurement event row (v2)
description: One metadata-only ledger row per lifecycle event. MUST NOT contain a raw session id, raw cwd, prompt, assistant text, command, or tool input/output. Identifiers are HMAC digests only; text-derived fields are boolean flags written only when FABLE_MEASURE_TEXT_SIGNALS=on.

session_key.description: HMAC(salt, session_id) — never the raw id

project_key.description: HMAC(salt, cwd) — never the raw path

event.description: lowercased lifecycle event name (sessionstart, userpromptsubmit, posttooluse, subagentstart, ...)

metrics.description: Integer counters/flags only. No string fields. Text-derived flags (e.g. reinstruction) appear only under the opt-in text-signals tier.
